monday.description: Pan-seared king crab legs mixed with ramen noodles, carrots, and cocktail sauce, bringing the components together with a savory sauce.

tuesday.description: Slow-cooked beef sirloin served with barley, dried white mushrooms, and a drizzle of nuoc cham, combining the ingredients through a rich beef broth.

wednesday.description: Roasted lamb leg paired with wheat germ, ivy gourd, and galangal root, tying the components together with a herb-infused glaze.

thursday.description: Shredded duck confit mixed with whole grain red quinoa, dried lion's mane mushrooms, and annatto seeds, bringing the ingredients together with a spicy quinoa pilaf.

friday.description: Pan-seared mortadella served with gluten-free pici, organic anaheim peppers, and a sprinkle of cardamom, combining the ingredients with a light and spicy sauce.

monday.description: Baked sliced tilsit cheese over whole grain polenta, eggplant, and a dollop of sheep butter, bringing the components together with a creamy cheese sauce.

tuesday.description: Stir-fried edamame beans with organic forbidden black rice, avocados, and a drizzle of ghee, combining the ingredients with a spicy stir-fry sauce.

wednesday.description: Sliced selles-sur-cher cheese served with carnaroli rice, turnips, and a sprinkle of ground mitmita, tying the components together with a creamy cheese sauce.

thursday.description: Stewed roman beans served with mantou bread, asian eggplant, and a sprinkle of ground dried cascabel chiles, bringing the ingredients together with a spicy bean stew.

friday.description: Roasted marcona almonds mixed with casarecce pasta, organic swiss chard, and a dollop of low-fat strained greek yogurt, combining the ingredients with a creamy and nutty sauce.
